title: Make way for a magic March
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A full month is on the cards...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A full month is on the cards at Blend Country Restaurant in March. With everything from classical and comedy to Afrikaans entertainment and a day of blues, there's something for everyone.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A full month is on the cards at Blend Country Restaurant in March. With everything from classical and comedy to Afrikaans entertainment and a day of blues, there's something for everyone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Presented by Better Live Events, the jam-packed month kicked off on Saturday 2 March with the internationally acclaimed Andrew Young, celebrated for his soulful and mesmerising saxophone melodies and captivating storytelling.","html":"Presented by Better Live Events, the jam-packed month kicked off on Saturday 2 March with the internationally acclaimed Andrew Young, celebrated for his soulful and mesmerising saxophone melodies and captivating storytelling."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His new show, Timeless, featured a night filled with enchanting tunes that span jazz, blues and contemporary modern masterpieces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On Saturday 9 March, Afrikaans comedian and local TV legend Casper de Vries brings you Semi-Lewendig - an adult-orientated Afrikaans show that brings a hilarity into storytelling in a way that only De Vries can get away with.","html":"On Saturday 9 March, Afrikaans comedian and local TV legend Casper de Vries brings you Semi-Lewendig - an adult-orientated Afrikaans show that brings a hilarity into storytelling in a way that only De Vries can get away with."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Changing gears, Sunday 17 March features a double-bill daytime show with two of South Africa's most exceptional blues guitarists: Dan Patlansky (who will be launching his new album Movin' on, and Basson Laubscher (featured in three previous Knysna Blues Festivals).","html":"Changing gears, Sunday 17 March features a double-bill daytime show with two of South Africa's most exceptional blues guitarists: Dan Patlansky (who will be launching his new album Movin' on, and Basson Laubscher (featured in three previous Knysna Blues Festivals)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dan Patlansky","html":"Dan Patlansky"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fans of blues and mind-bending guitar skills won't want to miss this one. What's more, organiser Better Live promises some surprises for attendees on the day...","html":"Fans of blues and mind-bending guitar skills won't want to miss this one. What's more, organiser Better Live promises some surprises for attendees on the day..."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chris Forrest is also visiting Knysna for the first time in decades on Saturday 23 March.","html":"Chris Forrest is also visiting Knysna for the first time in decades on Saturday 23 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Known for his razor-sharp wit, hilarious takes on life in South Africa and some seriously side-splitting observations, Chris is swapping potholes in Jozi for potholes in the Western Cape, and is here to make you laugh.... hard!","html":"Known for his razor-sharp wit, hilarious takes on life in South Africa and some seriously side-splitting observations, Chris is swapping potholes in Jozi for potholes in the Western Cape, and is here to make you laugh.... hard!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chris Forrest","html":"Chris Forrest"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And rounding off a month of entertainment is RAAF (formerly Bottom-less Coffee Band) on Thursday 28 March.","html":"And rounding off a month of entertainment is RAAF (formerly Bottom-less Coffee Band) on Thursday 28 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This entertaining theatrical journey will have you laughing, crying and most definitely partying - and is a musical experience you will never forget!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RAAF","html":"RAAF"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking forward to May, Knysna will once again be treated to rock legends Prime Circle. With a new lead singer (Gavin Edwards, The Voice finalist), boundless energy and superb songwriting and performance skills, this band has given audiences over 23 years of flawless and high-energy entertainment... and now, as they say, \"they're just getting started\".","html":"Looking forward to May, Knysna will once again be treated to rock legends Prime Circle. With a new lead singer (Gavin Edwards, The Voice finalist), boundless energy and superb songwriting and performance skills, this band has given audiences over 23 years of flawless and high-energy entertainment... and now, as they say, \"they're just getting started\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All tickets are available on quicket.co.za - or from Blend Country Restaurant (up until the day before each respective show).","html":"All tickets are available on quicket.co.za - or from Blend Country Restaurant (up until the day before each respective show)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow @BetterLiveSA on Facebook or visit www.betterlive.co.za for more information or enquiries.","html":"Follow @BetterLiveSA on Facebook or visit www.betterlive.co.za for more information or enquiries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
